words.definition: $x_{1}$ is an expanse of sky/the heavens at place $x_{2}$; [celestial].
$x_{1}$ is a person/people (noun) [not necessarily human]; $x_{1}$ displays personality/a persona.
$x_{1}$ talks/speaks to $x_{2}$ about subject $x_{3}$ in language $x_{4}$.
pro-sumti: me/we the speaker(s)/author(s); identified by self-vocative.
non-veridical descriptor: the one(s) described as ...
$x_1$ is a program, computer application for doing $x_2$ (clause)
pro-sumti: you listener(s); identified by vocative.
$x_{1}$ loves/feels strong affectionate devotion towards $x_{2}$ (object/state).
elidable marker: separates selbri from preceding sumti, allows preceding terminator elision.
time tense relation/direction: is [selbri]; during/simultaneous with [sumti]; present tense.
$c_2=t_1$ is a beginner in subject $c_1=t_2$ by standard $c_4$
$x_{1}$ [donor] gives/donates gift/present $x_{2}$ to recipient/beneficiary $x_{3}$ [without payment/exchange].
$x_{1}$ is yellow/golden [color adjective].
$x_{1}$ is a nest/house/lair/den/[home] of/for $x_{2}$.
$x_{1}$ is/acts as a friend of/to $x_{2}$ (experiencer); $x_{2}$ befriends $x_{1}$.
$x_{1}$ is a cat/[puss/pussy/kitten] [feline animal] of species/breed $x_{2}$; (adjective:) $x_{1}$ is feline.
$x_{1}$ teaches audience $x_{2}$ ideas/methods/lore $x_{3}$ (du'u) about subject(s) $x_{4}$ by method $x_{5}$ (event).
$x_{1}$ is fond of/likes/has a taste for $x_{2}$ (object/state).
$x_{1}$ is a dog/canine/[bitch] of species/breed $x_{2}$.
$x_{1}$ is beautiful/pleasant to $x_{2}$ in aspect $x_{3}$ (ka) by aesthetic standard $x_{4}$.
$x_{1}$ is fast/swift/quick/hastes/rapid at doing/being/bringing about $x_{2}$ (event/state).
$x_{1}$ reflects [Loglandic]/Lojbanic language/culture/nationality/community in aspect $x_{2}$.
$x_{1}$ inscribes/writes $x_{2}$ on display/storage medium $x_{3}$ with writing implement $x_{4}$; $x_{1}$ is a scribe.
$x_{1}$ knows fact(s) $x_{2}$ (du'u) about subject $x_{3}$ by epistemology $x_{4}$.
$x_{1}$ (agent) promises/commits/assures/threatens $x_{2}$ (event/state) to $x_{3}$ [beneficiary/victim].
$x_{1}$ (agent) expresses/says $x_{2}$ (sedu'u/text/lu'e concept) for audience $x_{3}$ via expressive medium $x_{4}$.
$x_{1}$ is happy/merry/glad/gleeful about $x_{2}$ (event/state).
$x_{1}$ eats/ingests/consumes (transitive verb) $x_{2}$.
$x_{1}$ is an apple [fruit] of species/strain $x_{2}$.
$x_{1}$ [seller] sells/vends $x_{2}$ [goods/service/commodity] to buyer $x_{3}$ for amount/cost/expense $x_{4}$.
$x_{1}$ is a computer for purpose $x_{2}$.
$x_1$ uses/employs $x_2$ [tool, apparatus, machine, agent, acting entity, material] for purpose $x_3$.
$x_{1}$ (quoted word(s)) is a/the name/title/tag of $x_{2}$ to/used-by namer/name-user $x_{3}$ (person).
$x_{1}$ is a/the language/dialect used by $x_{2}$ to express/communicate $x_{3}$ (si'o/du'u, not quote).
$x_{1}$ translates text/utterance $x_{2}$ to language $x_{3}$ from language $x_{4}$ with translation result $x_{5}$.
$x_{1}$ (action/event/state) motivates/is a motive/incentive for action/event $x_{2}$, per volition of $x_{3}$.
$x_{1}$ [person/agent] is an agentive cause of event $x_{2}$; $x_{1}$ does/brings about $x_{2}$.
$x_{1}$ (event) is late by standard $x_{2}$.
$x_{1}$ is able to do/be/capable of doing/being $x_{2}$ (event/state) under conditions $x_{3}$ (event/state).

sentences.sentence: le tsani cu melbi ca le cabdei
le zdani be mi cu pelxu
mi dunda le zdani be do do
mi nelci le nu tavla do
mi pu dunda le skami do
le se dunda cu xamgu mi
mi gasnu le nu do tadni la lojban
le melbi prenu cu gasnu le nu mi citka le grute
